description.zh: 訓練大腿、臀部與小腿肌肉，提供自然旋轉弧度的推腿動作
description.en: Trains thighs, glutes and calves with a natural pivoting arc for safer leg pressing

steps.zh: 調整座椅位置，使膝蓋彎曲時約為 90 度
steps.en: Adjust the seat so your knees bend to about 90 degrees

steps.zh: 雙腳平放在踏板上，與肩同寬，腳尖微微向外
steps.en: Place feet flat on the platform shoulder-width apart, toes slightly outward

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議從 20–40 公斤開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners start with 20–40 kg

steps.zh: 扳開安全把手，緩慢彎曲膝蓋讓踏板向身體靠近
steps.en: Release the safety handle and slowly bend your knees to lower the platform

steps.zh: 用腿部力量將踏板推回，過程中保持腳跟貼穩
steps.en: Drive the platform back up with your legs, keeping heels flat throughout

mistakes.zh: 不要讓膝蓋向內夾，保持與腳趾方向一致
mistakes.en: Don't let knees cave inward — keep them aligned with your toes

mistakes.zh: 不要在最高點鎖死膝蓋，保留微彎保護關節
mistakes.en: Don't fully lock your knees at the top — keep a slight bend to protect your joints

warning.zh: 使用完畢務必重新鎖上安全把手，避免踏板意外滑落造成受傷
warning.en: Always re-engage the safety lock after use to prevent the platform from dropping

description.zh: 幫助初學者練習引體向上，輔助重量越重越輕鬆
description.en: Helps beginners practice pull ups — the more assistance weight you select, the easier it is

steps.zh: 選擇輔助重量：數字越大代表輔助越多、越輕鬆，初學者建議從體重的 50–70% 開始
steps.en: Select assistance weight: a higher number means more help and easier movement — beginners start at 50–70% of body weight

steps.zh: 調整膝蓋墊高度至合適位置
steps.en: Adjust the knee pad to a comfortable height

steps.zh: 雙膝跪上膝蓋墊，雙手握住上方橫桿，握距略寬於肩
steps.en: Kneel on the pad and grip the overhead bar slightly wider than shoulder-width

steps.zh: 用背部與手臂的力量將身體向上拉，直到下巴超過橫桿
steps.en: Pull your body upward using your back and arms until your chin clears the bar

steps.zh: 緩慢控制身體下降回到起始位置，不要讓身體自由落下
steps.en: Slowly lower yourself back to the starting position — don't let your body drop

mistakes.zh: 不要用甩動身體借力，保持動作穩定控制
mistakes.en: Don't swing your body to assist the movement — keep it controlled

mistakes.zh: 不要快速落下，向下的過程同樣需要肌肉控制
mistakes.en: Don't drop down too quickly — the lowering phase also builds strength

warning.zh: 注意：選擇的輔助重量數字越小代表越困難，初學者請從較大的數字開始
warning.en: Important: a LOWER weight number means LESS assistance and HARDER movement — beginners should start with a HIGHER number

description.zh: 專門訓練二頭肌，纜繩設計提供全程穩定阻力
description.en: Isolates and trains the biceps with consistent cable resistance throughout the movement

steps.zh: 調整座椅高度，使手肘可以自然貼放在手臂墊上
steps.en: Adjust seat height so your elbows rest naturally on the arm pad

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議從 5–10 公斤開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners start with 5–10 kg

steps.zh: 雙手以正握（掌心向上）握住握把
steps.en: Grip the handles with an underhand grip (palms facing up)

steps.zh: 保持手肘緊貼手臂墊，將握把向上彎舉至肩膀位置
steps.en: Keeping elbows on the pad, curl the handles upward toward your shoulders

steps.zh: 緩慢放下回到起始位置，感受二頭肌伸展
steps.en: Slowly lower back to the starting position and feel the stretch in your biceps

mistakes.zh: 不要讓手肘離開手臂墊，手肘移動會減少二頭肌訓練效果
mistakes.en: Don't lift your elbows off the pad — this reduces bicep engagement

mistakes.zh: 不要用甩動或借力方式舉起重量
mistakes.en: Don't use momentum or swinging to lift the weight

warning.zh: 若感到手肘或手腕疼痛請立即停止，檢查座椅高度是否正確
warning.en: Stop immediately if you feel elbow or wrist pain — check that your seat height is correctly adjusted

description.zh: 訓練臀部外側與大腿外側肌群，有助於塑造臀型
description.en: Trains the outer glutes and outer thighs — great for shaping and strengthening the hips

steps.zh: 調整座椅高度並選擇適合的重量，初學者建議從輕重量開始
steps.en: Adjust the seat height and select a weight — beginners should start light

steps.zh: 坐下，背部挺直貼合椅背，雙腳放入腿部靠墊內側
steps.en: Sit with your back straight against the seat, place your legs inside the leg pads

steps.zh: 雙手握住把手以保持穩定
steps.en: Hold the side handles for stability

steps.zh: 用臀部外側力量將雙腿向外推開，動作要穩定
steps.en: Push your legs outward against the resistance using your outer glutes — keep the movement controlled

steps.zh: 緩慢將雙腿收回起始位置，不要讓重量快速彈回
steps.en: Slowly bring your legs back together — don't let the weight snap back

mistakes.zh: 不要向前傾身借力，保持背部貼合椅背
mistakes.en: Don't lean forward to assist — keep your back flat against the seat

mistakes.zh: 不要讓重量快速回位，控制全程動作
mistakes.en: Don't let the weight return quickly — control the movement throughout

warning.zh: 動作過程中避免用力甩腿，穩定的動作才能有效訓練並避免受傷
warning.en: Avoid jerking or swinging your legs — smooth, controlled movement is safer and more effective

description.zh: 專門訓練大腿前側股四頭肌，是塑造大腿線條的入門器材
description.en: Isolates the quadriceps (front thighs) — a great beginner machine for toning the legs

steps.zh: 調整座椅使膝蓋對齊機器的旋轉軸心點
steps.en: Adjust the seat so your knees align with the machine's pivot point

steps.zh: 調整腳墊位置至腳踝前方
steps.en: Adjust the foot pad to sit just above your ankles

steps.zh: 裝上適合的槓片並插上安全插銷
steps.en: Load the appropriate plates and insert the safety pin

steps.zh: 雙手握住兩側把手，將雙腿向上伸展至幾乎打直
steps.en: Hold the side handles and extend both legs upward until nearly straight

steps.zh: 緩慢放下回到起始位置，感受大腿前側用力
steps.en: Slowly lower back to the start position and feel the tension in your front thighs

mistakes.zh: 不要在最高點鎖死膝蓋，保留微彎以保護膝關節
mistakes.en: Don't lock your knees fully at the top — keep a slight bend to protect the joint

mistakes.zh: 不要用甩腿方式借力，動作要緩慢控制
mistakes.en: Don't swing your legs using momentum — keep the movement slow and controlled

warning.zh: 若感到膝蓋疼痛請立即停止，檢查膝蓋是否對齊旋轉軸心，或降低重量
warning.en: Stop immediately if you feel knee pain — check that your knees are aligned with the pivot point, or reduce the weight
